name: Hare Masale Vala Murgh- Chicken in Spinach Sauce -India
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 lbs skinless chicken pieces, cut into servings
1/2 tsp cayenne pepper, or to taste
4 inch piece fresh ginger root, coarsely chopped
4 fresh hot green chilies, with seeds, coarsely chopped
2 packs frozen chopped spinach, defrost and drain
3/8 cup grainy mustard, Pommery Moutarde de Meaux
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large, wide nonstick pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add bay leaves, cardamom, cinnamon, cloves, and red chilies to the hot oil. Stir.
3. Add chicken pieces and brown them.
4. Stir in raisins, yogurt, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper. Bring mixture to a simmer.
5. Cover tightly and reduce heat to low. Simmer for 15 minutes.
6. While the chicken simmers, blend ginger with 3 tablespoons water until smooth. Add green chilies and cilantro; continue blending.
7. Blend in defrosted, drained spinach until it has a coarse texture.
8. Remove cover from pan and add the green sauce. Stir to combine.
9. Return cover and cook for an additional 10 minutes or until chicken is tender. Adjust seasoning as needed before serving.
